intro: The Tushar Lab is a newly established and growing research group. We welcome motivated individuals with interests in medical imaging AI, data-centric machine learning, and computational health sciences.
how_to_apply: If our research resonates with you, we encourage you to reach out directly via email at ftushar@arizona.edu. Please include your CV and a brief statement of research interests. Specific positions will be posted here as they become available.
general_message: While specific positions have not yet been finalized, we anticipate openings for PhD students, postdoctoral researchers, and research staff in the near future. We are always eager to hear from motivated individuals. If our research resonates with you, we encourage you to check back here for updates or reach out directly.
